headline: How to Appear in Google's AI Overviews for Legal Searches
articleBody: AEO is the new SEO for lawyers. While Google AI Overviews take over the top of the search page, traditional links are getting pushed down. To stay on top, your firm needs to be the 'cited source' within that AI-generated summary. It’s a technical shift that requires a different approach to content. If you want to dominate the AEO space, our team is ready to help you pivot today.
